mano_cua.result_summary: Obsidian 插件项目（manifest.json 确认 id=task-board, minAppVersion=1.4.13），无法在浏览器中独立运行。dev 命令是 esbuild 构建脚本，不启动 web server。需要 Obsidian 桌面应用才能测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Obsidian plugin project. Cannot run standalone in browser. dev command is esbuild build script, not a web server. Requires Obsidian desktop app to test.
